title: L0 Capability Types Registry
description: Bootstrap registry for agent capability types. RFC 6763 pattern. PR process for new types.

attestation.description: Can attest to facts about other agents or actions

delivery.description: Can deliver work products with verifiable receipts

scoring.description: Can evaluate and score other agents or deliverables

settlement.description: Can handle financial settlement (escrow, payment, staking)

discovery.description: Can resolve agent identities and capabilities

meta.registration_process: PR to capability-types.json with: name, description, version, verifiable_by, epistemic_weight
constraints: Types MUST be verifiable — no self-declared unauditable capabilities
